# Solvia Codes

> Solvia Codes is a premier software house in Peshawar, Pakistan. Specializing in custom SaaS product building, web & mobile app development, UI/UX design, graphic designing, and performance marketing (Meta Ads & Google Ads).

## Core Pages & System Navigation

- [Official Website & Portfolio](https://www.solvia.codes/#home): Main landing page, interactive portfolio, and company profile.
- [About Solvia Codes](https://www.solvia.codes/#about): Engineering approach, technology stack, and vision.
- [Software Development Services](https://www.solvia.codes/#services): Detailed overview of custom SaaS product building, web & mobile app development.
- [Graphic Designing & UI/UX Services](https://www.solvia.codes/#services): Brand identity, custom logo design, UI/UX wireframes, and design systems.
- [Ads Running & Performance Marketing](https://www.solvia.codes/#services): Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), Google PPC campaigns, and lead generation.
- [Team & Leadership](https://www.solvia.codes/#team): Key engineers, designers, and growth leads at Solvia Codes.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.solvia.codes/#faq): Common questions regarding services, technologies, location, and quotes.
- [Start a Project / Contact](https://www.solvia.codes/#contact): Project inquiry form, direct email, and phone contact.

## Key Information & Contacts

- [Contact Email](mailto:contact@solvia.codes): Direct email for project inquiries and quotes (`contact@solvia.codes`).
- [Phone / WhatsApp](tel:+923109950325): Direct phone & WhatsApp support (`+92 310 9950325`).
- [Instagram Profile](https://www.instagram.com/solvia_codes/): Official Instagram updates and portfolio showcases.
- [XML Sitemap](https://www.solvia.codes/sitemap.xml): Complete site URL map for search indexers.
- [Web Manifest](https://www.solvia.codes/site.webmanifest): Web application manifest and branding properties.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What services does Solvia Codes offer?
Solvia Codes offers full-stack web and mobile app development, custom SaaS product building, UI/UX design, graphic designing, visual identity systems, and performance marketing including Meta Ads and Google Ads management.

### Where is Solvia Codes located?
Solvia Codes is located in Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan (Geo Coordinates: 34.0151, 71.5249). We serve clients in Pakistan and internationally.
